notes: INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY LAW scan. 10 niches confirmed blue ocean. 0 duplicates filtered. Key finding: IP law is the most economically consequential legal domain for the digital economy — every creator, developer, entrepreneur, and investor operates under it daily. AI & IP Law (score 25/25) is the highest-velocity emerging niche: 15M+ AI practitioners, 50M+ AI app users, and every artist watching their work be scraped without consent. Copyright Law (score 25/25) addresses the most universal IP need — every creator, musician, photographer, and writer needs it. Patent Law (score 24/25) targets entrepreneurs and engineers who invent but cannot protect. Open Source Licensing (score 22/25) captures every developer using GitHub. The IP Law category has the largest professional audience of any legal niche scanned — it spans from solo creators to enterprise engineers.
